narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 2-C (precinct in Ross County) has 695 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points.
